headline: How J. M. Smucker (SJM) Story Is Shifting With Activist Involvement And Coffee Cost Trends
summary: The analyst’s fair value estimate for J. M. Smucker now sits at US$126.60, up from US$123.44, putting fresh numbers around a stock that is getting renewed attention. Behind that shift, recent Street commentary has focused on earnings reactions, green coffee cost trends, and the influence of Elliott Management and its board involvement. As you read on, you will see how these pieces fit together and what to watch as the story around J. M. Smucker continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't...
